ansible-lint.description: Run the repo-managed ansible-lint policy against playbooks and the packaged collection.
ansible-lint.command: export ANSIBLE_CONFIG=/workspace/ansible.cfg; export ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_PATH=/workspace/collections${LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR:+:$LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR}; ANSIBLE_LINT_NODEPS=1 ansible-lint playbooks collections/ansible_collections/lv3/platform

ansible-syntax.description: Syntax check every tracked playbook outside the shared playbook task includes.
ansible-syntax.command: export ANSIBLE_CONFIG=/workspace/ansible.cfg; export ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_PATH=/workspace/collections${LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR:+:$LV3_ANSIBLE_COLLECTIONS_DIR}; for playbook in $(git -C /workspace ls-files 'playbooks/*.yml' 'playbooks/groups/*.yml' 'playbooks/services/*.yml' | awk -F/ '$1 == "playbooks" && $2 != "tasks" { print }'); do ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml "$playbook" --syntax-check >/dev/null; done

packer-validate.description: Validate all Packer templates when the repo carries them; otherwise report a no-op pass.
packer-validate.command: if [ -d packer ] && find packer -name '*.pkr.hcl' -print -quit | grep -q .; then packer validate packer; else echo 'No packer templates present'; fi

schema-validation.description: Validate canonical repository data models, cross references, and receipt schemas.
schema-validation.command: python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/service_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/environment_topology.py --validate >/dev/null && python scripts/subdomain_catalog.py --validate >/dev/null && ./scripts/agent_tool_registry.py --export-mcp >/dev/null && python scripts/mutation_audit.py --validate-schema >/dev/null

security-scan.description: Run the repository filesystem through the pinned Trivy security scan policy.
security-scan.command: trivy fs --scanners misconfig,secret --skip-db-update --skip-dirs .git --skip-dirs .worktrees --skip-files docker/check-runners/ansible/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/infra/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/python/Dockerfile --skip-files docker/check-runners/security/Dockerfile --exit-code 1 --severity HIGH,CRITICAL .

tofu-validate.description: Validate OpenTofu configuration if the repo carries a tofu root; otherwise report a no-op pass.
tofu-validate.command: if [ -d tofu ]; then tofu -chdir=tofu validate; else echo 'No tofu configuration present'; fi

type-check.description: Type check the gate orchestration code and the manifest-backed Docker runner surfaces.
type-check.command: mypy --cache-dir /tmp/mypy-cache scripts/parallel_check.py scripts/run_gate.py scripts/gate_status.py scripts/log_gate_bypass.py config/windmill/scripts/post-merge-gate.py tests/test_parallel_check.py tests/test_validation_gate.py

yaml-lint.description: Run full-repository yamllint across tracked YAML files.
